content:
# Evergreen Account Terms

## Account Profile
The Evergreen Account is a Northstar Bank checking account for personal customers. It may be used in deposit account comparisons when the customer is evaluating personal checking options. For side-by-side positioning against other checking products, see "Checking Account Comparison Guide" and "Light Blue Account Terms."

## Opening Requirements
1. Open the Evergreen Account only when the customer is seeking a checking account and qualifies as a personal customer.
2. The minimum opening deposit is 100. Do not quote a lower opening amount or waive this requirement from this article.
3. If the customer asks whether the account earns interest, state that the Evergreen Account has an APY of 0.15.

## Monthly Cost
- Monthly fee: 25
- Fee waiver balance: 5000

The monthly fee applies unless the balance condition for the waiver is met. Do not apply another waiver basis unless a separate Northstar Bank article supplies that rule.

## Closing Cost
An early closure fee of 50 applies when the Evergreen Account is closed within 90 days of opening. For employee handling of closure requests, see "Internal: Deposit Account Closure Policy."
title: Evergreen Account Terms
